info.title: Vulnerability Management APIs
info.description:
You can export the OpenAPI specs in the [Cortex Stoplight instance](https://cortex-panw.stoplight.io/docs/cortex-xsiam-3-x/p33kkp4bzrel1-vulnerability-management-ap-is). 

Managing vulnerabilities effectively is crucial to proactively maintaining the security, integrity, and availability of IT infrastructure. Cortex Cloud provides a comprehensive vulnerability management platform, helping you identify, assess, prioritize, and remediate security vulnerabilities across your entire IT infrastructure including endpoints, code, and cloud.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

tags.name: Vulnerability Management
tags.description: Public APIs for vulnerability policy management

post.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of vulnerability management policies with optional filtering and sorting capabilities. This endpoint allows you to search through policies based on various criteria such as name, status, priority, and other attributes.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

requestBody.description: Request payload containing filter, sort, and pagination options for listing policies

post.description:
Create a new vulnerability management policy for issue creation, kubernetes runtime protection, or prevention actions.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

requestBody.description: Request payload containing the policy configuration to create

put.description:
Update an existing vulnerability management policy by providing its unique identifier.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

requestBody.description: Request payload containing the updated policy configuration

get.description:
Retrieve a specific vulnerability management policy by its unique identifier.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

delete.description:
Delete an existing vulnerability management policy using a policy ID.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

schema.title: Response Delete Policy Public Api Uvm Public V1 Delete Policy  Id  Delete

post.description:
Trigger On demand Scan based on AssetId on one of CORTEX_NETWORK_SCANNER, CORTEX_XDR_AGENT, CORTEX_XDR_AGENTLESS scanners.

**Required license:** Cortex Cloud Runtime Security or Cortex Cloud Posture Management

requestBody.description: Request payload containing the asset ID and scanner type for triggering a scan

locked.title: Locked
locked.description:
Filter passed in from the application that is not intended to be modified by the user.
Be aware that this field is not guaranteed to not be modified by the user.

ScanRequest.description: Request model for triggering a vulnerability scan

asset_id.title: Asset Id
asset_id.description: The unique identifier of the asset to scan

scanner_type.description: The type of scanner to use for the scan

cve_id.title: Cve Id
cve_id.description: CVE identifier (e.g., 'CVE-2024-1234'). Required when scanner_type is CORTEX_NETWORK_SCANNER, optional for other scanner types.

scan_target.title: Scan Target
scan_target.description: Scan Target  (e.g., 'CONTAINER' or 'HOST' or 'IMAGE'). Required when scanner_type is CORTEX_XDR_AGENT and its Linux endpoint, optional for other scanner types.

ScanRequest.title: ScanRequest

ScanResponse.description: Response model for scan trigger operation
ScanResponse.title: ScanResponse

RELATIVE_TIMESTAMP.title: RELATIVE_TIMESTAMP
RELATIVE_TIMESTAMP.description:
The value is after or equal to the server time minus the SEARCH_VALUE.

The server uses its current UTC time in milliseconds when evaluating.
This means repeated evaluation of the same message can
theoretically produce different results if they fall within
a millisecond window.
